Describe the visible changes in the room layout and presence of people throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white shelves with folded fabrics are visible beside a green curtain; at 2s, stacks of textiles appear on the blue patterned rug; at 14s, a person with short dark hair stands between the curtain and shelves; at 16s, a person with short grey hair is visible at the bottom of the frame.

question: Track the appearance and position of any individuals visible in the fabric storage room.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the room contains only shelves and stacked fabrics without people; at 14s, a person wearing a white shirt stands near the green fabric curtain; at 16s, the individual with short hair is visible at the bottom of the frame near stacked folded items on the floor.
